title: Subprocess execution via f-string interpolation in paths.py
description: archivebox/config/paths.py and django.py use subprocess calls with f-string interpolated variables for chown/chmod. While variables are internally controlled UIDs, pattern is vulnerable to symlink attacks.
recommendation: Replace with subprocess.run() and proper argument arrays

title: Zero code review enforcement on dev branch
description: OpenSSF scorecard shows 0/29 changesets with approved code review. Branch protection on dev lacks required approvers, codeowners review, status checks.
recommendation: Enable branch protection with required reviews on dev branch

title: Minimal branch protection configuration
description: Dev branch lacks required approvers, CODEOWNERS review, and required status checks. OpenSSF Branch-Protection score: 1/10.
recommendation: Configure branch protection rules matching project maturity

title: YAML parsing errors in GitHub Actions workflows
description: OpenSSF scorecard reports YAML syntax errors in workflow files (line 80), causing ERROR status for 5 checks.
recommendation: Fix YAML syntax errors to restore OpenSSF checks

title: Type coverage gap despite pyright configuration
description: Pyright configured but effective coverage ~48%. Heavy Any type and liberal cast() usage. No py.typed marker.

title: Bare except patterns suppress errors
description: Multiple except Exception: pass patterns in hooks.py and service files. No custom exception hierarchy.
recommendation: Replace bare except with specific types, add custom exceptions

title: Permissive ALLOWED_HOSTS default
description: Default ALLOWED_HOSTS='*' creates permissive security baseline for network-exposed deployments.
recommendation: Document production hardening, consider warning on default

title: Cookie security flags disabled by default
description: SESSION_COOKIE_SECURE=False and CSRF_COOKIE_SECURE=False. Risky for network-exposed deployments.
recommendation: Auto-detect HTTPS and enable secure cookies

title: Plugin documentation scattered across CLAUDE.md
description: Plugin rules in prose sections rather than structured per-plugin docs or enforced contracts.

title: No custom exception hierarchy
description: 153 raise statements use generic exceptions. No ArchiveBox-specific exception classes.
recommendation: Create exception hierarchy for different failure modes

title: Deprecated dependency: atomicwrites==1.4.1
description: Package flagged with TODO for removal. Deprecated.
recommendation: Remove and replace with pathlib alternatives

title: 58 CLI command files may contain redundancy
description: Each command in separate file. Potential for shared patterns not factored into base class.
recommendation: Consider CLI command base class for shared patterns

title: CONTRIBUTING.md minimal (39 lines)
description: Basic contribution process. Most methodology lives in CLAUDE.md.

title: Claude Code CI workflow integration
description: claude.yml shows Claude Code in GitHub Actions. Forward-thinking AI-in-CI.

title: Mature coverage infrastructure
description: pytest-cov, parallel coverage, JSON+jq analysis. Coverage used for dead code detection.
recommendation: Extract methodology for dead code detection
